case_title: ALBERT CHOI VS. TYCO INTEGRATED SECURITY LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -STAMPED SIGNATURE SERVED OCT-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TYCO INTEGRATED SECURITY LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-07-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. " DEFENDANT AGREES TO WAIVE THE CANCELLATION FEE OF $719.40. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY, THE MATTER SHOULD BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TYLER ROACH--AREA MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (CT CORPORATION - AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOI, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT TYCO INTEGRATED SECURITY LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 12/13/13. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,699.40 FILED BY CHOI, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT TYCO INTEGRATED SECURITY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
